title: Normalize an Embedding Vector
description: Normalize an embedding vector to unit length so cosine similarity reduces to a dot product.
problem: Write normalize_vector(v) returning a new list where each component is divided by the vector's L2 norm, each rounded to 4 decimals. If the norm is 0, return the vector unchanged.
starter_code:
import math

def normalize_vector(v):
    # Divide each component by sqrt(sum of squares); handle zero vector
    return v
hint: norm = math.sqrt(sum(x*x for x in v)); if norm == 0: return v; return [round(x/norm, 4) for x in v]
